title: Nizam Release-Train Manifest Schema
description: Validates a release-train-manifest INSTANCE -- the Promote-stage artifact that ecosystem/05_release_train_coordination.md requires (NIP-0002 Stage 4; NDEBT-035). A manifest records a coordinated cross-repository promotion: it names the reconciliation plan it was built from (schema/reconciliation_plan.schema.json), carries that plan's packet ids as provenance, admits a subset of them into the train (each naming its target repository), records per-repository train membership, and captures whether the operator's admission decision (H-TRAIN-ENTRY) is recorded. This schema enforces the SHAPE (a source plan + its packet-id set, admitted packets with a per-repo target, train members, a recorded-admission flag, a PASS/FAIL train verdict). Two relational invariants -- the trace-to-plan invariant (every admitted packet id MUST appear in plan_packets; an orphan forces FAIL) and its interplay with the verdict -- span the admitted-packet array against plan_packets and are enforced in code by validate.sh C12, mirroring the ecosystem_membership exactly-one-list rule (NDEBT-031) and the reconciliation_plan cycle rule (NDEBT-035). One in-schema if/then (a PASS train requires the admission decision recorded) is schema-checkable. Permits additionalProperties so consumers can enrich the manifest (train cadence, versions, note) without breaking validation, per schema/README.md's house convention.

admitted_packet.description: One work packet admitted into the train, drawn from the reconciliation plan. Its id MUST trace to a plan packet id (plan_packets); it names the repository it targets.

id.description: The admitted packet's id -- MUST appear in plan_packets (the trace-to-plan invariant). An admitted id with no plan origin is an orphan.

repo.description: The repository this admitted packet targets.

schema_version.description: The semantic version of the manifest shape this instance conforms to. Required.

source_plan.description: Path to the reconciliation plan (schema/reconciliation_plan.schema.json) this train was built from. Required as the train's provenance.

plan_packets.description: The reconciliation plan's packet ids, carried as provenance so each admitted packet can be checked to trace to one. Required.

train_verdict.description: The single train verdict: PASS iff every admitted packet traces to a plan packet AND the H-TRAIN-ENTRY admission decision is recorded; FAIL iff at least one admitted packet is an orphan (recorded in orphan_findings) or the admission decision is not recorded.

entry_gate_recorded.description: True iff the operator's H-TRAIN-ENTRY admission decision has been recorded (ecosystem/05 Section 5). A PASS train requires this true; a tool MUST refuse to emit a PASS manifest without it.

admitted_packets.description: The work packets admitted into this train (Section: admitted_packet).

train_members.description: The repositories participating in this train's departure -- per-repository train membership.

orphan_findings.description: Recorded orphan admissions (admitted packet ids with no plan origin). Empty when every admitted packet traces to a plan packet; non-empty forces train_verdict FAIL.

allOf.description: A PASS train requires the admission decision recorded: if train_verdict is PASS, entry_gate_recorded MUST be true. (The trace-to-plan invariant -- an orphan admission forcing FAIL -- spans admitted_packets against plan_packets and is enforced in code by validate.sh C12.)
